subject: [PATCH v2 05/28] fsnotify: new tracepoint in fsnotify()

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new tracepoint to the fsnotify function, allowing developers to see exactly how it is being called. The tracepoint includes various fields such as the file system mask, data type, inode information, and cookie value. This will aid in debugging and understanding the behavior of the fsnotify function.
